requirement_topic.en: NTC Mandatory Type Approval Certificate and Permit to Import (RA 7925 / EO 59)
requirement_topic.zh: NTC强制型号认证证书及进口许可（RA 7925 / 第59号行政令）
requirement_topic.zht: NTC強制型號認證證書及進口許可（RA 7925 / 第59號行政令）

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment imported into or sold in the Philippines must obtain a mandatory Type Approval (TA) certificate from the National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) under Republic Act 7925 (Public Telecommunications Policy Act of the Philippines) and Executive Order 59 before importation or sale. Coverage includes Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, IoT, and any device operating in licensed or unlicensed radio frequency bands. NTC type approval testing is conducted at NTC-accredited laboratories, including DOST-ITDI (Department of Science and Technology — Industrial Technology Development Institute) or overseas laboratories recognised by NTC through ILAC or MRA arrangements. An NTC sticker bearing the TA certificate number must be affixed to the product and outer packaging before customs clearance. For commercial shipments, importers must also obtain a separate NTC Permit to Import (PTI) before goods clear Philippine Bureau of Customs. FCC (US) or CE (EU) test reports from ILAC/MRA-accredited laboratories may be submitted to NTC as supporting documentation for equivalency review since the Philippines uses a 60 Hz / US-aligned power grid, but such reports do not constitute a substitute for NTC type approval and do not by themselves grant Philippine market access. Chinese CCC, SRRC, and MIIT NAL certifications are not recognised by NTC and provide no exemption. There is no mutual recognition agreement (MRA) between the Philippines and China for telecommunications equipment type approval.
summary.zh: 所有进口至菲律宾或在菲律宾销售的无线电及电信终端设备，须在进口或销售前依据《共和国法案7925》（菲律宾公共电信政策法）和第59号行政令取得国家电信委员会（NTC）颁发的强制型号认证（TA）证书。覆盖范围包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、物联网及任何在授权或非授权无线电频段运行的设备。NTC型号认证测试在NTC认可实验室进行，包括科技部工业技术开发研究所（DOST-ITDI）或NTC通过ILAC或MRA协议认可的境外实验室。产品及外包装须在通关前贴附印有TA证书编号的NTC标贴。商业货运进口商还须在货物清关前单独取得NTC进口许可（PTI）。由于菲律宾采用60Hz/美式电网，来自ILAC/MRA认可实验室的FCC（美国）或CE（欧盟）测试报告可作为支持性文件提交NTC进行等效性审查，但不构成NTC型号认证的替代，亦不单独授予菲律宾市场准入资格。中国CCC、SRRC及MIIT进网许可不被NTC承认，不提供任何豁免。菲律宾与中国之间不存在电信设备型号认证相互认可协定。
summary.zht: 所有進口至菲律賓或在菲律賓銷售的無線電及電信終端設備，須在進口或銷售前依據《共和國法案7925》（菲律賓公共電信政策法）和第59號行政令取得國家電信委員會（NTC）頒發的強制型號認證（TA）證書。覆蓋範圍包括Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、物聯網及任何在授權或非授權無線電頻段運行的設備。NTC型號認證測試在NTC認可實驗室進行，包括科技部工業技術發展研究所（DOST-ITDI）或NTC通過ILAC或MRA協議認可的境外實驗室。產品及外包裝須在通關前貼附印有TA證書編號的NTC標貼。商業貨運進口商還須在貨物清關前單獨取得NTC進口許可（PTI）。由於菲律賓採用60 Hz/美式電網，來自ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的FCC（美國）或CE（歐盟）測試報告可作為支持性文件提交NTC進行等效性審查，但不構成NTC型號認證的替代，亦不單獨授予菲律賓市場准入資格。中國CCC、SRRC及MIIT進網許可不被NTC承認，不提供任何豁免。菲律賓與中國之間不存在電信設備型號認證相互認可協定。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 7925 — Public Telecommunications Policy Act of the Philippines (NTC type approval authority)
Executive Order No. 59 — Prescribing a Policy for More Competitive Telecommunications Services (reinforcing NTC regulatory mandate)
NTC Memorandum Circular — Type Approval of Radio Communications Equipment (current applicable MC)
Republic Act No. 3846 — Radio Control Law of the Philippines (as amended)
NTC Permit to Import (PTI) — required for commercial importation of all radio and telecom devices before Bureau of Customs clearance

summary.en: For wireless devices exported from China, the domestic certification chain includes: (1) SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) radio type approval issued by MIIT for all devices using radio frequencies; (2) MIIT Network Access License (NAL / jin wang xu ke zheng) for terminal equipment connecting to public telecommunications networks; (3) CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA for products within mandatory CCC scope. Chinese manufacturers hold test reports from CNAS-accredited laboratories to GB standards (GB/T 9254 for EMC; GB 4943.1 for safety). None of these Chinese approvals are recognised by Philippine NTC.
summary.zh: 从中国出口的无线设备，国内认证链包括：（1）MIIT颁发的无线电型号核准（SRRC），适用于所有使用无线电频率的设备；（2）适用于接入公共电信网络终端设备的MIIT进网许可证（NAL）；（3）CNCA主管的中国强制认证（CCC），适用于强制认证范围内的产品。中国制造商持有CNAS认可实验室出具的GB标准测试报告（EMC适用GB/T 9254；安全适用GB 4943.1）。上述中国认证均不被菲律宾NTC承认。
summary.zht: 從中國出口的無線設備，國內認證鏈包括：（1）MIIT頒發的無線電型號核准（SRRC），適用於所有使用無線電頻率的設備；（2）適用於接入公共電信網路終端設備的MIIT進網許可證（NAL）；（3）CNCA主管的中國強制認證（CCC），適用於強制認證範圍內的產品。中國製造商持有CNAS認可實驗室出具的GB標準測試報告（EMC適用GB/T 9254；安全適用GB 4943.1）。上述中國認證均不被菲律賓NTC承認。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio type approval — MIIT / State Radio Regulation of China (under Telecommunications Regulations of PRC)
MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可证) — YD/T terminal equipment standards
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA / GB 4943.1 safety; GB/T 9254 EMC
GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment EMC (aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 4943.1 — Information technology equipment safety (aligned with IEC 60950-1)

gap.en: Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, and CCC certifications provide zero exemption from the Philippines' mandatory NTC type approval certificate. A full, separate NTC type approval is required for every device model before import or sale. An NTC Permit to Import (PTI) must also be obtained before commercial shipments clear Philippine customs — this is separate from the TA certificate. No MRA exists between the Philippines and China for telecommunications device type approval. FCC or CE test reports from ILAC/MRA-accredited labs may be submitted to NTC for equivalency consideration (facilitated by the 60 Hz / US-aligned Philippine grid) but do not substitute for NTC type approval. An NTC sticker bearing the TA number must appear on the product label before customs clearance. Common exporter error: shipping without a PTI or NTC TA certificate, or assuming FCC or CE approval is sufficient — Philippine Bureau of Customs will detain shipments lacking valid NTC documentation.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC、MIIT进网许可及CCC认证对菲律宾强制NTC型号认证证书不提供任何豁免。每款设备型号均须在进口或销售前单独完成NTC型号认证。商业货运还须在菲律宾海关清关前单独取得NTC进口许可（PTI）——该许可与TA证书相互独立。菲律宾与中国之间不存在电信设备型号认证相互认可协定。来自ILAC/MRA认可实验室的FCC或CE测试报告可向NTC提交作等效性考量（菲律宾60Hz /美式电网提供便利），但不能替代NTC型号认证。产品标签须在通关前贴附印有TA编号的NTC标贴。常见出口商错误：未持PTI或NTC型号认证证书发货，或误认为FCC或CE认可已足够——菲律宾海关将扣押缺少有效NTC文件的货物。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC、MIIT進網許可及CCC認證對菲律賓強制NTC型號認證證書不提供任何豁免。每款設備型號均須在進口或銷售前單獨完成NTC型號認證。商業貨運還須在菲律賓海關清關前單獨取得NTC進口許可（PTI）——該許可與TA證書相互獨立。菲律賓與中國之間不存在電信設備型號認證相互認可協定。來自ILAC/MRA認可實驗室的FCC或CE測試報告可向NTC提交作等效性考量（菲律賓60 Hz /美式電網提供便利），但不能替代NTC型號認證。產品標籤須在通關前貼附印有TA編號的NTC標貼。常見出口商錯誤：未持PTI或NTC型號認證證書發貨，或誤認為FCC或CE認可已足夠——菲律賓海關將扣押缺少有效NTC文件的貨物。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NTC type approval certificate required for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment before importation or sale in the Philippines under RA 7925 and EO 59; separate NTC Permit to Import (PTI) also required for commercial shipments; NTC sticker on product required; no equivalence with CE, FCC, SRRC, CCC, or MIIT NAL
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval (MIIT) for all radio-frequency devices; MIIT NAL for terminal equipment connecting to public networks; CCC for applicable product categories under CNCA; GB standards compliance required

source.publisher: National Telecommunications Commission (NTC) — Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] NTC type approval is mandatory for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment before import into or sale in the Philippines under RA 7925 and EO 59. A separate NTC Permit to Import (PTI) is also required for commercial shipments before Bureau of Customs clearance. No equivalence exists with FCC, CE, Chinese SRRC, MIIT NAL, or CCC certifications. FCC/CE-accredited lab test reports may support NTC TA applications as equivalency evidence (aided by the Philippine 60 Hz / US-aligned grid) but do not replace TA. An NTC sticker bearing the TA number must appear on the product label before customs clearance. Devices without valid NTC documentation will be detained at Philippine customs.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据RA 7925和第59号行政令，NTC型号认证是所有无线电及电信终端设备进口至菲律宾或在菲律宾销售前的强制要求。商业货运在菲律宾海关清关前还须单独取得NTC进口许可（PTI）。与FCC、CE、中国SRRC、MIIT进网许可或CCC认证不存在等效认可。FCC/CE认可实验室测试报告可作为等效证据支持NTC型号认证申请（菲律宾60Hz /美式电网提供便利），但不能替代型号认证。产品标签须在通关前贴附印有TA编号的NTC标贴。缺少有效NTC文件的设备将被菲律宾海关扣押。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據RA 7925和第59號行政令，NTC型號認證是所有無線電及電信終端設備進口至菲律賓或在菲律賓銷售前的強制要求。商業貨運在菲律賓海關清關前還須單獨取得NTC進口許可（PTI）。與FCC、CE、中國SRRC、MIIT進網許可或CCC認證不存在等效認可。FCC/CE認可實驗室測試報告可作為等效證據支持NTC型號認證申請（菲律賓60 Hz /美式電網提供便利），但不能替代型號認證。產品標籤須在通關前貼附印有TA編號的NTC標貼。缺少有效NTC文件的設備將被菲律賓海關扣押。
